display_name: Human Pangenome Reference Consortium pan-variant calls
ingest_command: for asm in $(ls hprc-r2/decomposed/*.vcf.gz); do bcftools view $asm; done | bcftools sort -Oz -o hprc_merged.vcf.gz && llmap variant-ingest --source hprc_panvariants --kind mixed --bucket-bp 100 --output hprc.priors
notes: Pangenome-derived SNVs and SVs from 219 haplotype-resolved assemblies; especially strong in formerly-hard regions (centromeres, SDs, immunoglobulin loci). Highest value for the IGHG project.
